steps.title: Translate the question
steps.content: The question asks what percent of $360$ equals $90$. Use $$\text{percent}=\frac{\text{part}}{\text{whole}}\cdot 100$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• $25\%$, gives $0.25(360)=90$. Correct.
  • $50\%$, gives $180$.
  • $75\%$, gives $270$.
  • $225\%$, gives $810$.
That matches the correct answer, A.
